g.text: Distributed Training Mechanics: Inter-GPU Statistics Synchronization and Local Isolation

ul.li: Pros: No blocking I/O, maximum GPU utilization.
Cons: Batch size restricted per GPU; stats diverge.
Pros: Correct stats for small local batches (B < 8).
Cons: Performance hit from All-Reduce; blocking call.
Use Case: Semantic Segmentation, Object Detection.

text.tspan: Each GPU tracks independent moving averages.
Statistical variance across ranks leads to unstable
convergence on small local batch sizes.
σ²_global = Σ(σ²ᵢ + μᵢ²) × nᵢ / N_total - μ²_global
Exact same Batch Normalization statistics applied
across all ranks. Mimics large-batch training.
